name: Jersey Swaddle Blanket 2pk - Cloud Island™ Rainbows
description:
Lend whimsical touch to your little one's nursery decor with this Two-Pack of Jersey Swaddle Blankets from cloud island™. Made with soft jersey fabric, these swaddle blankets feature knitted construction to help keep your baby warm as you swaddle them. They can also be used as a cozy surface for changing, or as a burp cloth, a stroller cover and more. This swaddle blanket set includes one solid peach blanket and one with rainbow print over a white background, giving you two cute options for keeping your little one comfy.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
